descripcion: Clientes con mayor monto de ventas (JOIN con tabla clientes)
sql_template: SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS total_ventas, COUNT(v.id)::int AS num_ventas FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN ventas v ON v.cliente_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.nombre HAVING COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0) > 0 ORDER BY total_ventas DESC LIMIT 10

descripcion: Clientes con mayor monto de compras
sql_template: SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS total_ventas, COUNT(v.id)::int AS num_ventas FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN ventas v ON v.cliente_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.nombre ORDER BY total_ventas DESC LIMIT 10

descripcion: Cliente con mayor cantidad de facturas emitidas
sql_template: SELECT c.nombre, COUNT(f.id) AS cant FROM facturas f JOIN clientes c ON c.id=f.cliente_id {where} GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY cant DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT c.nombre, SUM(v.cantidad) AS cant FROM ventas v JOIN clientes c ON c.id=v.cliente_id {where} GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY cant DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT c.id, c.nombre, MAX(v.fecha) AS ultima FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN ventas v ON v.cliente_id=c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.nombre HAVING MAX(v.fecha) IS NULL OR MAX(v.fecha) < (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days') ORDER BY ultima NULLS FIRST LIMIT 50

descripcion: Clientes registrados en el mes actual
sql_template: SELECT nombre, documento, COALESCE(email,'') AS email FROM clientes WHERE empresa_id=1 AND DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) ORDER BY created_at DESC
sql_fallback: SELECT nombre, documento FROM clientes WHERE empresa_id=1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 20

sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_hoy, COUNT(*)::int AS num_ventas FROM ventas WHERE fecha::date = CURRENT_DATE

descripcion: Total de ventas del día anterior
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_ayer, COUNT(*)::int AS num_ventas FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND DATE(fecha) = CURRENT_DATE - 1

descripcion: Total de ventas de los últimos 7 días
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_semana, COUNT(*)::int AS num_ventas FROM ventas WHERE fecha >= DATE_TRUNC('week', CURRENT_DATE)

descripcion: Total de ventas del mes en curso
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_mes, COUNT(*)::int AS num_ventas FROM ventas WHERE DATE_TRUNC('month', fecha) = DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)

descripcion: Total de ventas del año en curso
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_anio, COUNT(*)::int AS num_ventas FROM ventas WHERE DATE_TRUNC('year', fecha) = DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total),0) AS promedio FROM ventas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(total),0) AS maximo FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(total),0) AS minimo FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Promedio de monto por venta registrada
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total),0)::numeric AS ticket_promedio, COALESCE(MAX(total),0)::numeric AS venta_maxima, COALESCE(MIN(total),0)::numeric AS venta_minima, COUNT(*)::int AS num_ventas FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id = 1

SELECT p.nombre, SUM(fd.cantidad)::int AS cantidad_vendida, SUM(fd.subtotal)::numeric AS monto_total FROM factura_detalle fd JOIN productos p ON p.id = fd.producto_id GROUP BY p.id, p.nombre ORDER BY cantidad_vendida DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Ranking de productos por cantidad o monto de ventas
sql_template: SELECT p.nombre, SUM(fd.cantidad)::int AS cantidad_vendida, SUM(fd.subtotal)::numeric AS monto_total FROM factura_detalle fd JOIN productos p ON p.id = fd.producto_id GROUP BY p.id, p.nombre ORDER BY cantidad_vendida DESC LIMIT 10

descripcion: Total de ventas agrupado por cada cliente
sql_template: SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS total_ventas, COUNT(v.id)::int AS num_ventas FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN ventas v ON v.cliente_id=c.id WHERE c.empresa_id=1 GROUP BY c.nombre ORDER BY total_ventas DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

nombre: Comparativo Ventas Mes Actual vs Anterior
descripcion: Comparación de ventas del mes actual contra el mes anterior
intenciones: este mes vs mes pasado ventas
sql_template: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN fecha >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN total ELSE 0 END)::numeric AS mes_actual, SUM(CASE WHEN fecha >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 month') AND fecha < date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) THEN total ELSE 0 END)::numeric AS mes_anterior FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cantidad FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cantidad FROM facturas {where}
SELECT * FROM facturas {where} LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM facturas {where} LIMIT 100

descripcion: Ventas totales y promedio por cliente para medir rentabilidad
intenciones: que cliente me da mas ganancia
cual es mi cliente mas rentable
sql_template: SELECT c.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS ventas FROM clientes c LEFT JOIN ventas v ON v.cliente_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.nombre ORDER BY ventas DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Número promedio de compras por cliente
sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cantidad FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Cliente con mayor frecuencia de compra
sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cantidad FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(total),0) AS maximo FROM facturas {where}

nombre: Ventas por Día de la Semana
descripcion: Qué días se vende más (análisis por día de semana)
sql_template: SELECT TO_CHAR(fecha, 'Day') AS dia, COUNT(*)::int AS num_ventas, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' GROUP BY TO_CHAR(fecha,'Day'), EXTRACT(DOW FROM fecha) ORDER BY EXTRACT(DOW FROM fecha)
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(total),0) AS maximo FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(MIN(total),0) AS minimo FROM facturas {where}
SELECT * FROM facturas {where} LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM facturas {where} LIMIT 100
SELECT * FROM facturas {where} LIMIT 100

SELECT f.numero, c.nombre AS cliente, f.fecha::date AS fecha, f.total, f.estado FROM facturas f LEFT JOIN clientes c ON c.id = f.cliente_id WHERE f.estado IN ('pendiente','por cobrar') ORDER BY f.fecha DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cantidad FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Porcentaje de cotizaciones convertidas en ventas
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Cliente que gasta más por compra
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total),0) AS promedio FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Cliente que gasta menos por compra
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(AVG(total),0) AS promedio FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Porcentaje de ventas aportado por cada cliente
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Ingresos totales (ventas) menos costo de compras = utilidad bruta
sql_template: SELECT (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1),0))::numeric AS utilidad_bruta, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1),0)::numeric AS ingresos, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1),0)::numeric AS costos
sql_mes: SELECT (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0))::numeric AS utilidad_bruta

sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM asientos_contables {where}

SELECT COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas),0)::numeric AS ventas_totales, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras),0)::numeric AS compras_totales, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(monto) FROM gastos),0)::numeric AS gastos_totales, (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(monto) FROM gastos),0))::numeric AS utilidad_neta

descripcion: Porcentaje de ganancia sobre ventas totales
sql_template: SELECT CASE WHEN SUM(v.total) > 0 THEN ROUND(((SUM(v.total) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1),0)) / SUM(v.total) * 100)::numeric, 2) ELSE 0 END AS margen_pct, COALESCE(SUM(v.total),0)::numeric AS ventas_total, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1),0)::numeric AS compras_total FROM ventas v WHERE v.empresa_id=1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM asientos_contables {where}

descripcion: Ingresos (ventas) menos egresos (compras) del mes = flujo neto
sql_template: SELECT fecha::date AS fecha, concepto, ingreso, egreso, (ingreso - egreso) AS flujo FROM caja ORDER BY fecha DESC LIMIT 10
sql_mes: SELECT (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0))::numeric AS flujo_neto, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0)::numeric AS ingresos, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0)::numeric AS egresos

sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM asientos_contables {where}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ingreso),0)::numeric AS total_ingresos FROM caja
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM asientos_contables {where}

descripcion: Total pendiente por cobrar a clientes (facturas pendientes)
sql_template: SELECT c.nombre AS cliente, COALESCE(SUM(f.total),0)::numeric AS deuda, COUNT(f.id)::int AS facturas FROM facturas f LEFT JOIN clientes c ON c.id = f.cliente_id WHERE f.estado = 'pendiente' GROUP BY c.id, c.nombre ORDER BY deuda DESC LIMIT 10
sql_total: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0)::numeric AS total_por_cobrar, COUNT(*)::int AS num_facturas FROM facturas WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND estado IN ('pendiente','parcial','por_cobrar')

descripcion: Total pendiente por pagar a proveedores
intenciones: cuanto le debo a mis proveedores
sql_template: SELECT pr.nombre AS proveedor, COALESCE(SUM(c.total),0)::numeric AS deuda, COUNT(c.id)::int AS compras FROM compras c LEFT JOIN proveedores pr ON pr.id = c.proveedor_id WHERE c.estado = 'pendiente' GROUP BY pr.id, pr.nombre ORDER BY deuda DESC LIMIT 10
sql_total: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_por_pagar, COUNT(*)::int AS num_compras FROM compras WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND estado IN ('pendiente','parcial','por_pagar')

descripcion: Ganancia antes de intereses, impuestos, depreciación y amortización (ventas - compras directas)
sql_template: SELECT (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0))::numeric AS ebitda_aprox, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0)::numeric AS ingresos, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(total) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0)::numeric AS costos

descripcion: Resumen de ingresos, costos y gastos

nombre: Productos con Stock Bajo o Crítico
descripcion: Productos que están por debajo del stock mínimo
sql_template: SELECT nombre, stock::numeric AS stock_actual, stock_min::numeric AS stock_minimo, (stock_min - stock)::numeric AS unidades_faltantes FROM productos WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND stock <= stock_min ORDER BY (stock_min - stock) DESC

descripcion: Productos con stock igual a cero — sin existencias
sql_template: SELECT nombre, precio::numeric, COALESCE(costo,0)::numeric AS costo FROM productos WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND stock <= 0 ORDER BY nombre

descripcion: Suma de (stock × precio) de todos los productos
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock * precio),0)::numeric AS valor_inventario, COALESCE(SUM(stock * COALESCE(costo,precio)),0)::numeric AS costo_inventario, SUM(stock)::numeric AS unidades_totales, COUNT(*)::int AS num_productos FROM productos WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND stock > 0

descripcion: Proveedores con mayor monto de compras (JOIN con tabla proveedores)
sql_template: SELECT pr.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(c.total),0)::numeric AS total_compras, COUNT(c.id)::int AS num_compras FROM proveedores pr LEFT JOIN compras c ON c.proveedor_id = pr.id GROUP BY pr.id, pr.nombre HAVING COALESCE(SUM(c.total),0) > 0 ORDER BY total_compras DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT pr.nombre, COALESCE(SUM(c.total),0)::numeric AS total_compras, COUNT(c.id)::int AS num_compras FROM proveedores pr LEFT JOIN compras c ON c.proveedor_id = pr.id GROUP BY pr.id, pr.nombre ORDER BY total_compras DESC LIMIT 10

descripcion: Qué proveedor tiene mayor volumen de compras (monto y cantidad)
sql_template: SELECT pr.nombre, COUNT(c.id)::int AS num_compras, COALESCE(SUM(c.total),0)::numeric AS monto_total FROM proveedores pr JOIN compras c ON c.proveedor_id=pr.id WHERE pr.empresa_id=1 GROUP BY pr.id,pr.nombre ORDER BY monto_total DESC LIMIT 5

descripcion: IGV calculado sobre la base imponible
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Valor de venta sin IGV (base sobre la que se calcula el 18%)
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total - igv),0)::numeric AS base_imponible, COALESCE(SUM(igv),0)::numeric AS igv_total, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_con_igv FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id = 1

descripcion: Total de IGV cobrado/generado en las ventas (débito fiscal)
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(igv),0)::numeric AS igv_ventas, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_ventas, COALESCE(SUM(total - igv),0)::numeric AS base_imponible FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id = 1
sql_mes: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(igv),0)::numeric AS igv_ventas, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_ventas FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND fecha >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)

descripcion: IGV de las compras — se usa como crédito fiscal contra el débito
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(igv),0)::numeric AS igv_compras, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS total_compras FROM compras WHERE empresa_id = 1
sql_mes: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(igv),0)::numeric AS igv_compras FROM compras WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND fecha >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)

nombre: IGV Neto a Pagar a SUNAT
descripcion: Débito fiscal (IGV ventas) menos crédito fiscal (IGV compras) = IGV a declarar
intenciones: cuanto pago a sunat de igv
sql_template: SELECT (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(igv) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(igv) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1),0))::numeric AS igv_a_pagar, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(igv) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1),0)::numeric AS debito_fiscal, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(igv) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1),0)::numeric AS credito_fiscal
sql_mes: SELECT (COALESCE((SELECT SUM(igv) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0) - COALESCE((SELECT SUM(igv) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)),0))::numeric AS igv_a_pagar

descripcion: Cantidad y monto total de facturas emitidas
sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS num_facturas, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS monto_total, COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(impuesto,0)),0)::numeric AS igv_total FROM facturas WHERE empresa_id = 1 AND fecha >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)

descripcion: Facturas con detracción o retención registradas
sql_template: SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS num_facturas, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS monto_total FROM facturas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND (tipo='detraccion' OR estado='detraccion')

descripcion: Lista de ventas registradas con fecha, cliente y monto
sql_template: SELECT v.id, v.fecha::text, COALESCE(c.nombre,'Sin cliente') AS cliente, v.total::numeric, v.estado FROM ventas v LEFT JOIN clientes c ON c.id=v.cliente_id WHERE v.empresa_id=1 ORDER BY v.fecha DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total),0) AS total FROM facturas {where}

descripcion: Clientes ordenados por saldo pendiente de pago
sql_template: SELECT cl.nombre AS cliente, SUM(f.saldo)::numeric AS deuda_total, COUNT(f.id)::int AS num_facturas FROM facturas f JOIN clientes cl ON cl.id = f.cliente_id WHERE f.empresa_id = 1 AND f.estado IN ('pendiente','parcial','por_cobrar') GROUP BY cl.nombre ORDER BY deuda_total DESC LIMIT 15

descripcion: Vista ejecutiva: ventas, compras, IGV a pagar, cuentas pendientes
sql_template: SELECT 'Ventas mes' AS concepto, COALESCE(SUM(total),0)::numeric AS monto FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE) UNION ALL SELECT 'Compras mes', COALESCE(SUM(total),0) FROM compras WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE) UNION ALL SELECT 'Facturas por cobrar', COALESCE(SUM(saldo),0) FROM facturas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND estado IN ('pendiente','parcial') UNION ALL SELECT 'IGV ventas mes', COALESCE(SUM(igv),0) FROM ventas WHERE empresa_id=1 AND fecha>=date_trunc('month',CURRENT_DATE)
SELECT id, nombre, COALESCE(documento,'') AS documento, COALESCE(email,'') AS email FROM proveedores ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 10

descripcion: Comparación total de ingresos y gastos
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ingreso),0)::numeric AS total_ingresos, COALESCE(SUM(egreso),0)::numeric AS total_gastos, (COALESCE(SUM(ingreso),0) - COALESCE(SUM(egreso),0))::numeric AS utilidad FROM caja

intenciones: cual es el ruc del cliente
sql_template: SELECT id, nombre, COALESCE(documento,'') AS documento, COALESCE(email,'') AS email, COALESCE(telefono,'') AS telefono FROM clientes ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 10
SELECT f.numero, c.nombre AS cliente, f.fecha::date AS fecha, f.total, f.estado FROM facturas f LEFT JOIN clientes c ON c.id = f.cliente_id ORDER BY f.fecha DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, nombre, precio, costo, stock FROM productos ORDER BY nombre LIMIT 10

descripcion: Suma total de todos los gastos registrados
sql_template: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS total_gastos, COUNT(*)::int AS num_gastos FROM gastos
SELECT categoria, COALESCE(SUM(monto),0)::numeric AS total FROM gastos GROUP BY categoria ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT nombre, stock, precio, (stock * precio)::numeric AS valor_inventario FROM productos WHERE stock > 0 ORDER BY valor_inventario DESC LIMIT 10
